title: Phishing Attack Detected: Suspicious Password Reset Request

steps.message: Block the malicious domain 'it-support-portal.net' at the WAF/firewall level based on the phishing alert to prevent further access to the illegitimate site, as phishing websites hosted on different domains are designed to persuade victims.
Query external threat intelligence platforms like VirusTotal for 'it-support-portal.net' to gather additional context and known malicious indicators related to phishing attacks.
Search email logs in the Email Security Gateway for any other emails originating from or containing URLs from 'it-support-portal.net' to identify other potential victims of this phishing campaign.

Approve forced password resets for any users identified as having potentially compromised credentials due to interacting with the phishing domain 'it-support-portal.net'. This is a high-impact action to prevent account takeover.
Execute script to force password resets for all identified compromised accounts, as approved by the SOC_LEAD, to mitigate the impact of the phishing attack.

Disseminate a security awareness alert to relevant internal communication channels regarding the phishing attempt involving 'it-support-portal.net' and remind users of best practices against phishing attacks.

params.message: URGENT: Phishing Alert! A suspicious email from 'it-support-portal.net' requesting password resets has been detected. DO NOT click links or enter credentials. Report any similar emails.

steps.message: Create a formal incident ticket in the ticketing system for the phishing attack (Phishing from 'it-support-portal.net') and document all containment and remediation steps taken, referencing knowledge base articles on 'phishing attacks'.

params.description: User reported suspicious email from 'it-support-portal.net' requesting password reset. Domain blocked, TI queried, email logs scanned, password resets initiated. See attached for details.
